SKT_FIRST.name: Hurricane Combination
SKT_FIRST.name_jp: ハリケーン・コンビネーション

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The damage dealt is proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health lost</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The damage dealt is proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health lost</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The damage dealt is proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health lost</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The damage dealt is proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health lost</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. The damage dealt is proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health lost</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>残りHP</color>が低いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>残りHP</color>が低いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>残りHP</color>が低いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>残りHP</color>が低いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。このスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>残りHP</color>が低いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>15%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다. 이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>현재 체력</color>이 낮을수록 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>15%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。自身的<color=#28d9ed>当前生命值</color>越低,则该技能的伤害越高。

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy, dealing damage proportional to the percentage of the caster's <color=#28d9ed>missing Health</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy, dealing damage proportional to the percentage of the caster's <color=#28d9ed>missing Health</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy, dealing damage proportional to the percentage of the caster's <color=#28d9ed>missing Health</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy, dealing damage proportional to the percentage of the caster's <color=#28d9ed>missing Health</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy, dealing damage proportional to the percentage of the caster's <color=#28d9ed>missing Health</color> and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.1: Gains <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, but reduces <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> by <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Gains <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, but reduces <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> by <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Gains <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, but reduces <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> by <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Gains <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>, but <color=#f5203c>reduces</color> <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> by <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Gains <color=#28d9ed>Invulnerability</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>, but <color=#f5203c>reduces</color> <color=#28d9ed>Health</color> by <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: スキル使用時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>無敵</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与するが、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>の<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>がDOWNする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: スキル使用時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>無敵</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与するが、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>の<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>がDOWNする。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: スキル使用時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>無敵</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与するが、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>の<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>がDOWNする。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: スキル使用時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>無敵</color>と<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与するが、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>の<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>が<color=#f5203c>DOWN</color>する。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: スキル使用時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>無敵</color>と<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>効果を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与するが、<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>の<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>が<color=#f5203c>DOWN</color>する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>무적</color> 효과를 얻지만, <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>가 감소합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>무적</color> 효과를 얻지만, <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>가 감소합니다.
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>무적</color> 효과를 얻지만, <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>가 감소합니다.
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>무적</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color> 효과를 얻지만, <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>가 <color=#f5203c>감소</color>합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>무적</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color> 효과를 얻지만, <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>99%</color>가 <color=#f5203c>감소</color>합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 使用技能时,获得<color=#28d9ed>无敌</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,但会使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 使用技能时,获得<color=#28d9ed>无敌</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,但会使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>99%</color>。

true_desc_levels.4_zh: 使用技能时,获得<color=#28d9ed>无敌</color>和<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>,但会使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color><color=#f5203c>降低</color><color=#28d9ed>99%</color>。
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 使用技能时,获得<color=#28d9ed>无敌</color>和<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>,但会使<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color><color=#f5203c>降低</color><color=#28d9ed>99%</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce Effectiveness of the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to reduce Effectiveness of the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の効果命中を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:攻撃後、対象に<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
